name: Atlas
desc: Breaks fuzzy goals into concrete plans the rest of the team can execute.

name: Forge
desc: Writes, refactors, and debugs production code across whatever stack the project needs.

name: Cipher
desc: The mandatory code review gate — nothing ships until Cipher signs off.

name: Gauntlet
desc: Writes specs first, then verifies the build holds up under them.

name: Scout
desc: Runs deep web + vault research before we commit to a direction.

name: Lens
desc: Statistics, modeling, and turning raw numbers into a clear answer.

name: Quill
desc: Drafts blog posts, social copy, and long-form writing in a real human voice.

name: Pixel
desc: CSS/SVG-first design — UI, brand assets, and ad creatives.

name: Anchor
desc: Deploys, infrastructure, CI/CD, and the boring-but-critical glue.

name: Sage
desc: Keeps the vault clean so the team's memory stays useful instead of stale.

name: Herald
desc: Interviews me until a fuzzy idea becomes a real, shippable brief.

name: Prism
desc: The taste check — calls out anything that looks generic or off-brand.
